accountCard.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.

step1.title: Create a free account
step1.body: Go to <link>enablebanking.com</link> and register. Confirm your email address.

step2.title: Create an application
step2.body: Click <app>Applications</app> and then <newapp>New application</newapp>. Fill in:

step3.title: Link your accounts
step3.body: Link the accounts you want to sync with Lommin.

step4.title: Download the key file
step4.body: Click <register>Register</register> — a <pem>.pem</pem> file will be downloaded. Keep it safe, it cannot be downloaded again.

spiirImport.description: Import historical transactions from Spiir. Choose CSV export for simple import, or ZIP export (full data export) for better data with account names, bank and categories from Spiir. Duplicates are skipped.
spiirImport.noAccounts: No accounts found in the file. Check that the file is a valid Spiir export.
spiirImport.noAccountsZip: No accounts found in the ZIP file. Check that the file is a valid Spiir data export.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe locally — try again, or reload the page.
